	text = {
		trigger = {
			any_scope_state = { state_region = s:STATE_EASTERN_HIMALAYAS }
		}
		localization_key = RU_SL_DP_STATE_EASTERN_HIMALAYAS
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = RU_SL_DEFAULT_DP
	}
}

	log_loc_errors = no

}### INTEREST GROUP | ЗАИНТЕРЕСОВАННЫЕ ГРУППЫ ###
## ПАДЕЖИ ##
RU_IG_RP = {
	type = interest_group
	log_loc_errors = no
	text = {
		trigger = {
			is_interest_group_type = ig_landowners
			owner = {
				NOR = {
					AND = {
						c:ZAN ?= this
						any_primary_culture = { cu:bedouin = this }
						NOT = { any_primary_culture = { cu:swahili = this } }
					}
					any_primary_culture = {
						OR = {
							cu:polish = this
							cu:lithuanian = this
							cu:hungarian = this
						}
					}
					country_has_primary_culture = cu:romanian
					c:TUR ?= this
					c:PRU ?= this
					c:GER ?= this
					c:NGF ?= this
					c:RUS ?= this
					c:PAP ?= this
					c:GBR ?= this
					c:KOR ?= this
					c:CHI ?= this
					c:JAP ?= this
					c:AUS ?= this
					OR = {
						c:BIC ?= this
						any_primary_culture = {
							has_discrimination_trait_group = heritage_group_south_asian
						}
					}
					country_has_primary_culture = cu:hawaiian
					country_has_primary_culture = cu:australian
					country_has_primary_culture = cu:norwegian
					OR = {
						AND = {
							c:USA ?= this
							NOT = { exists = c:CSA }
						}
						country_has_primary_culture = cu:dixie
					}
				}
			}
		}
		localization_key = ig_landowners_RU_IG_RP
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			is_interest_group_type = ig_intelligentsia
			owner = {
				NOR = {
					country_has_primary_culture = cu:hawaiian
					any_primary_culture = {
						has_discrimination_trait = heritage_han
					}
					c:BIC ?= THIS
				}
			}
		}
		localization_key = ig_intelligentsia_RU_IG_RP
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			is_interest_group_type = ig_armed_forces
			owner = {
				NOR = {
					AND = {
						country_has_primary_culture = cu:japanese
						NOT = { has_global_variable = fall_of_the_samurai_global_var }
					}
					c:PRC ?= this
					NOR = {
						c:BIC ?= this
						is_subject = yes
						NOT = {
							has_government_type = gov_chartered_company
						}
						has_technology_researched = military_statistics
					}
					OR = {
						c:BIC ?= this
						is_subject = yes
						NOT = {
							has_government_type = gov_chartered_company
						}
						has_technology_researched = military_statistics
					}
					AND = {
						c:FRA ?= this
						ig:ig_armed_forces = {
							has_ideology = ideology:ideology_proletarian
							has_ideology = ideology:ideology_republican
						}
					}
					ig:ig_armed_forces = {
						has_ideology = ideology:ideology_proletarian
					}
				}
			}
		}
		localization_key = ig_armed_forces_RU_IG_RP
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			is_interest_group_type = ig_industrialists
			owner = {
				NOR = {
					c:BIC ?= this
					c:BIC = { has_variable = doctrine_of_lapse_ended }
				}
			}
		}
		localization_key = ig_industrialists_RU_IG_RP
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			is_interest_group_type = ig_industrialists
			owner = {
				c:BIC ?= this
				NOT = {
					c:BIC = { has_variable = doctrine_of_lapse_ended }
				}
			}
		}
		localization_key = ig_east_india_company_RU_IG_RP
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			is_interest_group_type = ig_industrialists
			owner = {
				c:BIC ?= this
				c:BIC = { has_variable = doctrine_of_lapse_ended }
			}
		}
		localization_key = ig_government_of_india_RU_IG_RP
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			is_interest_group_type = ig_rural_folk
			owner = {
				NOR = {
					any_primary_culture = {
						has_discrimination_trait = language_germanophone
					}
					c:EGY ?= this
					OR = {
						country_has_primary_culture = cu:yankee
						country_has_primary_culture = cu:dixie
					}
					country_has_primary_culture = cu:japanese
					country_has_primary_culture = cu:hawaiian
					OR = {
						c:BIC ?= this
						any_primary_culture = {
							has_discrimination_trait_group = heritage_group_south_asian
							NOT = {
								has_discrimination_trait = tradition_himalayan
							}
						}

RU_IG_DP = {
	type = interest_group
	log_loc_errors = no
	text = {
		trigger = {
			is_interest_group_type = ig_landowners
			owner = {
				NOR = {
					AND = {
						c:ZAN ?= this
						any_primary_culture = { cu:bedouin = this }
						NOT = { any_primary_culture = { cu:swahili = this } }
					}
					any_primary_culture = {
						OR = {
							cu:polish = this
							cu:lithuanian = this
							cu:hungarian = this
						}
					}
					country_has_primary_culture = cu:romanian
					c:TUR ?= this
					c:PRU ?= this
					c:GER ?= this
					c:NGF ?= this
					c:RUS ?= this
					c:PAP ?= this
					c:GBR ?= this
					c:KOR ?= this
					c:CHI ?= this
					c:JAP ?= this
					c:AUS ?= this
					OR = {
						c:BIC ?= this
						any_primary_culture = {
							has_discrimination_trait_group = heritage_group_south_asian
						}
					}
					country_has_primary_culture = cu:hawaiian
					country_has_primary_culture = cu:australian
					country_has_primary_culture = cu:norwegian
					OR = {
						AND = {
							c:USA ?= this
							NOT = { exists = c:CSA }
						}
						country_has_primary_culture = cu:dixie
					}
				}
			}
		}
		localization_key = ig_landowners_RU_IG_DP

RU_IG_VP = {
	type = interest_group
	log_loc_errors = no
	text = {
		trigger = {
			is_interest_group_type = ig_landowners
			owner = {
				NOR = {
					AND = {
						c:ZAN ?= this
						any_primary_culture = { cu:bedouin = this }
						NOT = { any_primary_culture = { cu:swahili = this } }
					}
					any_primary_culture = {
						OR = {
							cu:polish = this
							cu:lithuanian = this
							cu:hungarian = this
						}
					}
					country_has_primary_culture = cu:romanian
					c:TUR ?= this
					c:PRU ?= this
					c:GER ?= this
					c:NGF ?= this
					c:RUS ?= this
					c:PAP ?= this
					c:GBR ?= this
					c:KOR ?= this
					c:CHI ?= this
					c:JAP ?= this
					c:AUS ?= this
					OR = {
						c:BIC ?= this
						any_primary_culture = {
							has_discrimination_trait_group = heritage_group_south_asian
						}
					}
					country_has_primary_culture = cu:hawaiian
					country_has_primary_culture = cu:australian
					country_has_primary_culture = cu:norwegian
					OR = {
						AND = {
							c:USA ?= this
							NOT = { exists = c:CSA }
						}
						country_has_primary_culture = cu:dixie
					}
				}
			}
		}
		localization_key = ig_landowners_RU_IG_VP
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			is_interest_group_type = ig_intelligentsia
			owner = {
				NOR = {
					country_has_primary_culture = cu:hawaiian

						has_discrimination_trait = heritage_han
					}
					c:BIC ?= THIS
				}
			}
		}
		localization_key = ig_intelligentsia_RU_IG_VP
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			is_interest_group_type = ig_armed_forces

				NOR = {
					AND = {
						country_has_primary_culture = cu:japanese
						NOT = { has_global_variable = fall_of_the_samurai_global_var }
					}
					NOR = {
						c:BIC ?= this
						is_subject = yes
						NOT = {
							has_government_type = gov_chartered_company

					OR = {

RU_IG_TP = {
	type = interest_group
	log_loc_errors = no
	text = {
		trigger = {
			is_interest_group_type = ig_landowners
			owner = {
				NOR = {
					AND = {
						c:ZAN ?= this
						any_primary_culture = { cu:bedouin = this }
						NOT = { any_primary_culture = { cu:swahili = this } }
					}
					any_primary_culture = {
						OR = {
							cu:polish = this
							cu:lithuanian = this
							cu:hungarian = this
						}
					}
					country_has_primary_culture = cu:romanian
					c:TUR ?= this
					c:PRU ?= this
					c:GER ?= this
					c:NGF ?= this
					c:RUS ?= this
					c:PAP ?= this
					c:GBR ?= this
					c:KOR ?= this
					c:CHI ?= this
					c:JAP ?= this
					c:AUS ?= this
					OR = {
						c:BIC ?= this

					country_has_state_religion = rel:protestant
					country_has_state_religion = rel:sunni
					country_has_state_religion = rel:shiite
					country_has_state_religion = rel:oriental_orthodox
					country_has_state_religion = rel:hindu
					country_has_state_religion = rel:gelugpa
					country_has_state_religion = rel:theravada
					country_has_state_religion = rel:mahayana
				}
			}
		}
		localization_key = ig_ibadi_madrasahs_RU_IG_TP
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = ig_default_RU_TP
		fallback = yes
	}
}

					country_has_primary_culture = cu:yankee
					country_has_primary_culture = cu:dixie
				}
				NOR = {
					any_primary_culture = {
						has_discrimination_trait = language_germanophone
					}
					c:EGY ?= this
					country_has_primary_culture = cu:japanese
					country_has_primary_culture = cu:hawaiian
					OR = {
						c:BIC ?= this
						any_primary_culture = {
							has_discrimination_trait_group = heritage_group_south_asian
							NOT = {
								has_discrimination_trait = tradition_himalayan
							}
						}
					}
					OR = {
						any_primary_culture = {
							has_discrimination_trait_group = heritage_group_south_asian
							has_discrimination_trait = tradition_himalayan
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
		localization_key = ig_yeoman_farmers_RU_IG_PP

							country_has_primary_culture = cu:maori
							country_has_primary_culture = cu:australian
							country_has_primary_culture = cu:anglo_canadian
							country_has_primary_culture = cu:british
							country_has_primary_culture = cu:irish
							c:NRU ?= this
						}
					}
					country_has_state_religion = rel:orthodox
					OR = {
						country_has_primary_culture = cu:russian
						country_has_primary_culture = cu:byelorussian
						country_has_primary_culture = cu:ukrainian
					}
					AND = {
						country_has_state_religion = rel:protestant
						country_has_primary_culture = cu:danish
					}
					AND = {
						country_has_state_religion = rel:protestant
						country_has_primary_culture = cu:norwegian
					}
					AND = {
						country_has_state_religion = rel:protestant
						country_has_primary_culture = cu:swedish
					}
					AND = {
						country_has_state_religion = rel:protestant
						country_has_primary_culture = cu:finnish
					}
					AND = {
						country_has_state_religion = rel:mahayana
						OR = {
							country_has_primary_culture = cu:korean
							any_primary_culture = {
								has_discrimination_trait = heritage_han
							}
						}
					}
					c:PAP ?= this
					AND = {
						country_has_state_religion = rel:protestant
						OR = {
							country_has_primary_culture = cu:yankee
							country_has_primary_culture = cu:dixie
							country_has_primary_culture = cu:afro_american
							country_has_primary_culture = cu:cherokee
						}
					}
					country_has_state_religion = rel:catholic
					country_has_state_religion = rel:protestant
					country_has_state_religion = rel:sunni
					country_has_state_religion = rel:shiite
					country_has_state_religion = rel:oriental_orthodox
					country_has_state_religion = rel:hindu
					country_has_state_religion = rel:gelugpa
					country_has_state_religion = rel:theravada
					country_has_state_religion = rel:mahayana
				}
			}
		}
		localization_key = ig_ibadi_madrasahs_RU_IG_PP
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = ig_default_RU_PP
		fallback = yes
	}
}
